headline: Knee-to-waist SSE on a glassy morning — log it early or skip it.
today: Small but decent angle, and the morning is your only clean shot with light NE and offshore-ish flow before the SSE onshore builds in the afternoon. It's a mellow longboard roll, best around the midday high pushing in. Nothing pumping, but surfable if you're not picky.

daysToWatch.note: Building but SE cross-on 16mph most of the day keeps it choppy and disorganized.
Chest-high-plus at a good S angle, but SW turns cross-on to onshore. Size is there, cleanliness isn't.
The day to target. Chest-high SSE at 6-6.5s with N offshore holding all day — clean and fun, groveler or fish.
